TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: qalang_Kinyang金洋部落
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == cyan te inu qa qalang 部落概況與位置 == ccquliq qalang Kinos qani hiya ga, akya mtiyu kbhul spat he, maki te hminas cka rgyax na llyung Klesan, hminas kntheyaq na qalang qa rryaniq Suhwa, cingan pnsgagay uyi, snkwan piyux gaga na Tayal uyi. qalang Kinos mkura kya htxan wagi ga ski qalang Buta, mkura kya byaqan wagi ga ski qalang Skikun, mkura kya knkilux ga ski Rgayung, mkura kya tltu ga ski Ryuhen. maki te kkian skura magan seng tiyu kbhul meta kya, syax na llyung Nanawnan, skura tltu kya qa rgyax Yuen, mwani ga maki saying ini ptnaq qalang qa ccquliq, msqun mqyanux kya, maki nanaq qmes naha, qmesan naha qa pqwasan biru na llaqi na Kinyang, mskura kya htxan wagi na ryaniq Kinyang ga mqyanux kya qa ccquliq na Kinyang, mkura kya byaqan wagi na ryaniq Poay ga kkian na Kinos. . cinllwan lalu qalang 地名由來 gringan ga maki piyux knus cqa qalang Kinyang, mica qa cnllwan naha Kinus qa kkian qani, mwani lga pmiyon naha qurip qa qqyanux naha. glux rryaniq na mehong Kinyang ro hmkangi mkura babaw nya, baq tehok kya knbawiq qutux seng saying kbhul qa Pitung Utux, piyux calay kk'man nya, cyunga ga piyux ccquliq musa qmalup, pincqiqan yuhum ki Truku zok maki cqani cyunga. kintayux Kiristo, Tensinkyo naha ga maki cqa qnxan qalang, musa kyokay msqun inori, msqun pung ke, kblay smruw sn'lungan naha, snhyan miyup qnxan naha, gaga snhyan ro ryax pqasan naha ga musa psqunan qalang, sinxu,bokusi ga psbaq ro mlahang qabax naha, snhyan ro gaga si smimax qabax, kblayan kntayux cquliq, Kiristo ro Tensinkyo kmayan siyan, glwani, psimux, kblay qutux prrax ro blaq na qalang, maki cka qalang ga, iyat nanaq snhyan qa Kiristo ro Tensinkyo, pyanga yaw qa gaga ro qalang, kblay qutux kblaq na qalang. 基督, . rryaniq 部落交通 glux kisya: glux Donpukansyan biyaq cqa Nanaw ini ga Wuta, ro glux loyi glgan te'ksi musa Kinos. 搭車: muyut haya: garing Girang ini ga Kalinko glux te qesu rryaniq(rryaniq Suhwa) skura Klesan, maki bih qutux kbhul mtiyul payat kiro skura Buta, Kinyang. 開車: ,金洋. wahan mangay mcisan 部落觀光 Pitung Utux Pitung Utux ga maki cqa rrgyax cka Kinus, garing qalang Kinus musa ga, akya qutux tmucing ro mtiyul cnpung, glux ryaniq qqyanux pkaraw ski blihul na rrgyax, msngiyil tuqiy, blaq calay kintalan. 神秘湖 "神秘湖" .
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨjan te inu qa qalaŋ ******* == ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq qalaŋ kinos~ɕ qani ħija ɣa, akja mtiju kβħul s~ɕpat ħe, maki te ħminas~ɕ ʦ~ʨka rɣjax na lljuŋ kles~ɕan, ħminas~ɕ kntħejaq na qalaŋ qa rrjaniq s~ɕuħwa, ʦ~ʨiŋan pns~ɕɣaɣaj uji, s~ɕnkwan pijux ɣaɣa na tajal uji. qalaŋ kinos~ɕ mkura kja ħtxan waɣi ɣa s~ɕki qalaŋ βuta, mkura kja βjaqan waɣi ɣa s~ɕki qalaŋ s~ɕkikun, mkura kja knkilux ɣa s~ɕki rɣajuŋ, mkura kja tltu ɣa s~ɕki rjuħen. maki te kkian s~ɕkura maɣan s~ɕeŋ tiju kβħul meta kja, s~ɕjax na lljuŋ nanawnan, s~ɕkura tltu kja qa rɣjax juen, mwani ɣa maki s~ɕajiŋ ini ptnaq qalaŋ qa ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq, ms~ɕqun mqjanux kja, maki nanaq qmes~ɕ naħa, qmes~ɕan naħa qa pqwas~ɕan βiru na llaqi na kinjaŋ, ms~ɕkura kja ħtxan waɣi na rjaniq kinjaŋ ɣa mqjanux kja qa ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq na kinjaŋ, mkura kja βjaqan waɣi na rjaniq poaj ɣa kkian na kinos~ɕ. . ʦ~ʨinllwan lalu qalaŋ **** ɣriŋan ɣa maki pijux knus~ɕ ʦ~ʨqa qalaŋ kinjaŋ, miʦ~ʨa qa ʦ~ʨnllwan naħa kinus~ɕ qa kkian qani, mwani lɣa pmijon naħa qurip qa qqjanux naħa. ɣlux rrjaniq na meħoŋ kinjaŋ ro ħmkaŋi mkura βaβaw nja, βaq teħok kja knβawiq qutux s~ɕeŋ s~ɕajiŋ kβħul qa pituŋ utux, pijux ʦ~ʨalaj kkʔman nja, ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa pijux ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa qmalup, pinʦ~ʨqiqan juħum ki truku zok maki ʦ~ʨqani ʦ~ʨjuŋa. kintajux kiris~ɕto, tens~ɕinkjo naħa ɣa maki ʦ~ʨqa qnxan qalaŋ, mus~ɕa kjokaj ms~ɕqun inori, ms~ɕqun puŋ ke, kβlaj s~ɕmruw s~ɕnʔluŋan naħa, s~ɕnħjan mijup qnxan naħa, ɣaɣa s~ɕnħjan ro rjax pqas~ɕan naħa ɣa mus~ɕa ps~ɕqunan qalaŋ, s~ɕinxu,βokus~ɕi ɣa ps~ɕβaq ro mlaħaŋ qaβax naħa, s~ɕnħjan ro ɣaɣa s~ɕi s~ɕmimax qaβax, kβlajan kntajux ʦ~ʨquliq, kiris~ɕto ro tens~ɕinkjo kmajan s~ɕijan, ɣlwani, ps~ɕimux, kβlaj qutux prrax ro βlaq na qalaŋ, maki ʦ~ʨka qalaŋ ɣa, ijat nanaq s~ɕnħjan qa kiris~ɕto ro tens~ɕinkjo, pjaŋa jaw qa ɣaɣa ro qalaŋ, kβlaj qutux kβlaq na qalaŋ. **, . rrjaniq **** ɣlux kis~ɕja: ɣlux *onpukans~ɕjan βijaq ʦ~ʨqa nanaw ini ɣa wuta, ro ɣlux loji ɣlɣan teʔks~ɕi mus~ɕa kinos~ɕ. **: mujut ħaja: ɣariŋ ɣiraŋ ini ɣa kalinko ɣlux te qes~ɕu rrjaniq(rrjaniq s~ɕuħwa) s~ɕkura kles~ɕan, maki βiħ qutux kβħul mtijul pajat kiro s~ɕkura βuta, kinjaŋ. **: ,**. waħan maŋaj mʦ~ʨis~ɕan **** pituŋ utux pituŋ utux ɣa maki ʦ~ʨqa rrɣjax ʦ~ʨka kinus~ɕ, ɣariŋ qalaŋ kinus~ɕ mus~ɕa ɣa, akja qutux tmuʦ~ʨiŋ ro mtijul ʦ~ʨnpuŋ, ɣlux rjaniq qqjanux pkaraw s~ɕki βliħul na rrɣjax, ms~ɕŋijil tuqij, βlaq ʦ~ʨalaj kintalan. *** "***" .
S.FORM: == cyan te inu qa qalang 部落概況與位置 == ccquliq qalang Kinos qani hiya ga, akya mtiyu kbhul spat he, maki te hminas cka rgyax na llyung Klesan, hminas kntheyaq na qalang qa rryaniq Suhwa, cingan pnsgagay uyi, snkwan piyux gaga na Tayal uyi. qalang Kinos mkura kya htxan wagi ga ski qalang Buta, mkura kya byaqan wagi ga ski qalang Skikun, mkura kya knkilux ga ski Rgayung, mkura kya tltu ga ski Ryuhen. maki te kkian skura magan seng tiyu kbhul meta kya, syax na llyung Nanawnan, skura tltu kya qa rgyax Yuen, mwani ga maki saying ini ptnaq qalang qa ccquliq, msqun mqyanux kya, maki nanaq qmes naha, qmesan naha qa pqwasan biru na llaqi na Kinyang, mskura kya htxan wagi na ryaniq Kinyang ga mqyanux kya qa ccquliq na Kinyang, mkura kya byaqan wagi na ryaniq Poay ga kkian na Kinos. . cinllwan lalu qalang 地名由來 gringan ga maki piyux knus cqa qalang Kinyang, mica qa cnllwan naha Kinus qa kkian qani, mwani lga pmiyon naha qurip qa qqyanux naha. glux rryaniq na mehong Kinyang ro hmkangi mkura babaw nya, baq tehok kya knbawiq qutux seng saying kbhul qa Pitung Utux, piyux calay kk'man nya, cyunga ga piyux ccquliq musa qmalup, pincqiqan yuhum ki Truku zok maki cqani cyunga. kintayux Kiristo, Tensinkyo naha ga maki cqa qnxan qalang, musa kyokay msqun inori, msqun pung ke, kblay smruw sn'lungan naha, snhyan miyup qnxan naha, gaga snhyan ro ryax pqasan naha ga musa psqunan qalang, sinxu,bokusi ga psbaq ro mlahang qabax naha, snhyan ro gaga si smimax qabax, kblayan kntayux cquliq, Kiristo ro Tensinkyo kmayan siyan, glwani, psimux, kblay qutux prrax ro blaq na qalang, maki cka qalang ga, iyat nanaq snhyan qa Kiristo ro Tensinkyo, pyanga yaw qa gaga ro qalang, kblay qutux kblaq na qalang. 基督, . rryaniq 部落交通 glux kisya: glux Donpukansyan biyaq cqa Nanaw ini ga Wuta, ro glux loyi glgan te'ksi musa Kinos. 搭車: muyut haya: garing Girang ini ga Kalinko glux te qesu rryaniq(rryaniq Suhwa) skura Klesan, maki bih qutux kbhul mtiyul payat kiro skura Buta, Kinyang. 開車: ,金洋. wahan mangay mcisan 部落觀光 Pitung Utux Pitung Utux ga maki cqa rrgyax cka Kinus, garing qalang Kinus musa ga, akya qutux tmucing ro mtiyul cnpung, glux ryaniq qqyanux pkaraw ski blihul na rrgyax, msngiyil tuqiy, blaq calay kintalan. 神秘湖 "神秘湖" .
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨjan te inu qa qalaŋ ******* == ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq qalaŋ kinos~ɕ qani ħija ɣa, akja mtiju kβħul s~ɕpat ħe, maki te ħminas~ɕ ʦ~ʨka rɣjax na lljuŋ kles~ɕan, ħminas~ɕ kntħejaq na qalaŋ qa rrjaniq s~ɕuħwa, ʦ~ʨiŋan pns~ɕɣaɣaj uji, s~ɕnkwan pijux ɣaɣa na tajal uji. qalaŋ kinos~ɕ mkura kja ħtxan waɣi ɣa s~ɕki qalaŋ βuta, mkura kja βjaqan waɣi ɣa s~ɕki qalaŋ s~ɕkikun, mkura kja knkilux ɣa s~ɕki rɣajuŋ, mkura kja tltu ɣa s~ɕki rjuħen. maki te kkian s~ɕkura maɣan s~ɕeŋ tiju kβħul meta kja, s~ɕjax na lljuŋ nanawnan, s~ɕkura tltu kja qa rɣjax juen, mwani ɣa maki s~ɕajiŋ ini ptnaq qalaŋ qa ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq, ms~ɕqun mqjanux kja, maki nanaq qmes~ɕ naħa, qmes~ɕan naħa qa pqwas~ɕan βiru na llaqi na kinjaŋ, ms~ɕkura kja ħtxan waɣi na rjaniq kinjaŋ ɣa mqjanux kja qa ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq na kinjaŋ, mkura kja βjaqan waɣi na rjaniq poaj ɣa kkian na kinos~ɕ. . ʦ~ʨinllwan lalu qalaŋ **** ɣriŋan ɣa maki pijux knus~ɕ ʦ~ʨqa qalaŋ kinjaŋ, miʦ~ʨa qa ʦ~ʨnllwan naħa kinus~ɕ qa kkian qani, mwani lɣa pmijon naħa qurip qa qqjanux naħa. ɣlux rrjaniq na meħoŋ kinjaŋ ro ħmkaŋi mkura βaβaw nja, βaq teħok kja knβawiq qutux s~ɕeŋ s~ɕajiŋ kβħul qa pituŋ utux, pijux ʦ~ʨalaj kkʔman nja, ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa pijux ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa qmalup, pinʦ~ʨqiqan juħum ki truku zok maki ʦ~ʨqani ʦ~ʨjuŋa. kintajux kiris~ɕto, tens~ɕinkjo naħa ɣa maki ʦ~ʨqa qnxan qalaŋ, mus~ɕa kjokaj ms~ɕqun inori, ms~ɕqun puŋ ke, kβlaj s~ɕmruw s~ɕnʔluŋan naħa, s~ɕnħjan mijup qnxan naħa, ɣaɣa s~ɕnħjan ro rjax pqas~ɕan naħa ɣa mus~ɕa ps~ɕqunan qalaŋ, s~ɕinxu,βokus~ɕi ɣa ps~ɕβaq ro mlaħaŋ qaβax naħa, s~ɕnħjan ro ɣaɣa s~ɕi s~ɕmimax qaβax, kβlajan kntajux ʦ~ʨquliq, kiris~ɕto ro tens~ɕinkjo kmajan s~ɕijan, ɣlwani, ps~ɕimux, kβlaj qutux prrax ro βlaq na qalaŋ, maki ʦ~ʨka qalaŋ ɣa, ijat nanaq s~ɕnħjan qa kiris~ɕto ro tens~ɕinkjo, pjaŋa jaw qa ɣaɣa ro qalaŋ, kβlaj qutux kβlaq na qalaŋ. **, . rrjaniq **** ɣlux kis~ɕja: ɣlux *onpukans~ɕjan βijaq ʦ~ʨqa nanaw ini ɣa wuta, ro ɣlux loji ɣlɣan teʔks~ɕi mus~ɕa kinos~ɕ. **: mujut ħaja: ɣariŋ ɣiraŋ ini ɣa kalinko ɣlux te qes~ɕu rrjaniq(rrjaniq s~ɕuħwa) s~ɕkura kles~ɕan, maki βiħ qutux kβħul mtijul pajat kiro s~ɕkura βuta, kinjaŋ. **: ,**. waħan maŋaj mʦ~ʨis~ɕan **** pituŋ utux pituŋ utux ɣa maki ʦ~ʨqa rrɣjax ʦ~ʨka kinus~ɕ, ɣariŋ qalaŋ kinus~ɕ mus~ɕa ɣa, akja qutux tmuʦ~ʨiŋ ro mtijul ʦ~ʨnpuŋ, ɣlux rjaniq qqjanux pkaraw s~ɕki βliħul na rrɣjax, ms~ɕŋijil tuqij, βlaq ʦ~ʨalaj kintalan. *** "***" .
